_doc: Curated source of truth for energy generation balance. See energy.md for design principles. Re-derive draft data with: python scripts/audit-energy.py (writes energy-discovered.json). Update this file by hand when discovery finds new data or a config value changes.
_tier_note: 10 tiers locked 2026-05-07; ~4× geometric spacing from T1=1k (starter generator) to T10=200M (Fusion peak). Replaced earlier 5-tier scheme. Trophy-item gating is gone.

unit_conversions._note: Mekanism Joules→FE: divide J by 2.5. EnderIO uI is 1:1 with FE. AE2's AE→FE default conversion is 2 FE per AE.

generators.name: Solar Generator
generators.scaling: tile-array; sky access; ~50-70% of peak averaged across day
generators.notes: Entry-tier generator. ~50 panels = T1 (1k); ~200 panels = T2 (4k). Cannot meaningfully scale beyond T2.

generators.name: Advanced Solar Generator
generators.scaling: tile-array; sky required
generators.notes: Higher entry-tier. ~9 panels = T1; ~34 = T2; ~134 = T3. Beyond T3 is impractical at 120 FE/t/block.

generators.name: Bio Generator
generators.scaling: needs Bio Fuel feed; small-tile-array friendly
generators.notes: Best per-block early option among Mekanism fuel-fed gens. ~8 = T1; ~30 = T2; ~115 = T3.

generators.name: Heat Generator
generators.scaling: fe = (200 + 30*lavaSides + 100*ifNether) / 2.5; max 7 lava sides + nether
generators.notes: Peak ~204 FE/t per gen (7 lava sides in nether). ~5-13 = T1; ~20-50 = T2; T3+ impractical.

generators.name: Wind Generator
generators.scaling: 60–480 J/t Y-dependent (linear minY=24 to maxY=2031); ~average 110 FE/t at Y=128
generators.notes: Tower-mounted tiles. Easy spam but low ceiling per-block. ~10 high towers = T1; ~37 = T2.

generators.name: Gas-Burning Generator
generators.scaling: per generator at max burn with Ethene; output = energyDensity × burnRate, max 6.4 mB/t consumption; scaling is by adding more generators
generators.notes: Verified 2026-05-06 via Mekanism Wiki + JEI value reported by user. Ethene energyDensity = 11,280 FE/mB (28,200 J/mB), base burn 40 ticks/mB, max 6.4 mB/t → 72,192 FE/t per gen. ~1 gen = T4 (60k); ~4 gens = T5 (250k); ~14 gens = T6 (1M). T7+ at this rate (56+ gens) is impractical. Other gases far weaker (Hydrogen ~80 FE/t).

generators.name: Industrial Turbine
generators.scaling: multiblock; output ∝ steam flow ∝ blade count × disperser flow (1280 mB/t per disperser); 9×9 max-coil build with full Fission steam feed → ~25M FE/t
generators.notes: Required pair for any Mekanism nuclear path; numbers depend on Boiler/Fission feed. ~25M ceiling lands cleanly in T8.

generators.name: Fission Reactor
generators.scaling: heat = 1M J × burnRate (mB/t); burnRate scales 0.1 → fuelAssemblies × 1; ~64-79 assemblies max realistic = 6.4M-7.9M J/t direct heat → ~10M FE/t through Turbine
generators.notes: Heat must convert to power via boiler+turbine pipeline. ~80% pipeline efficiency. T7 (4M) easy; T8 (15M) requires near-max assemblies and pristine Turbine.

generators.name: Fusion Reactor
generators.scaling: fuelEnergy 10M J/mB × injection rate; max realistic injection rate puts output in 100M-300M FE/t range with steam-cooled designs
generators.notes: End-game multiblock; ignition requires Hohlraum-fed D-T fuel. Sub-peak injection lands in T9 (60M); peak ~200M = T10.

generators.name: Alternator
generators.scaling: per alternator at 256 RPM; needs 8 SU/RPM kinetic input = 2048 SU per alternator at peak; output transfer capped at 5000 FE/t
generators.notes: Practical scale ~30-100 alternators feasible with Steam Engine farm. ~3 = T1; ~12 = T2; ~45 = T3 (peak Steam Engine farm). T4+ unrealistic.

generators.name: Stirling Generator
generators.scaling: base 40 FE/t, capacitor tier multiplies (Octadic ≈ ×3 = 120 FE/t)
generators.notes: Per-block ceiling ~120 FE/t (Octadic). ~9-25 = T1; ~34 (Octadic) = T2; T3 needs ~134 blocks, impractical.

generators.name: Energetic Photovoltaic Module
generators.scaling: tile-array; midday clear-sky peak
generators.notes: Lowest-tier solar. ~250 panels = T1; T2 (4k = 1000 panels) is absurd.

generators.name: Pulsating Photovoltaic Module
generators.scaling: tile-array
generators.notes: Mid solar tier. ~63 = T1; ~250 = T2 (marginal).

generators.name: Vibrant Photovoltaic Module
generators.scaling: tile-array
generators.notes: Top solar tier in EnderIO. ~16 = T1; ~63 = T2; ~250 = T3 (impractical). T4+ infeasible.

generators.name: Soul Engine
generators.scaling: rate scales by soul vial mob's energy value; not in TOML
generators.notes: TBD: per-mob energy values are hardcoded. Verify via in-game JEI/EMI for highest-yield mobs (Ender Dragon, Wither, etc.).

generators.name: Vibration Chamber
generators.scaling: burns furnace-style fuel; outputs in AE2 native AE (default 2 FE per AE)
generators.notes: Niche; designed for AE network bootstrap, not bulk power. ~13 = T1; ~50 = T2.

generators.name: Pitiful Generator
generators.scaling: burns furnace-style fuel; tile-array
generators.notes: Cheapest IF starter gen. ~33 = T1; T2 (4k = 134 gens) is impractical.

generators.name: Biofuel Generator
generators.scaling: feeds on Biofuel produced by Bioreactor (consumes 400 FE/op + crops); tile-array
generators.notes: IF biofuel loop. ~7 = T1; ~25 = T2; T3 (~100 gens) is impractical. Pair with Bioreactor + Plant Sower/Gatherer for a full automated farm.

generators.name: Basic Generator
generators.scaling: burns furnace-style fuel; tile-array
generators.notes: Oritech entry generator. ~31 = T1; T2 needs ~125 gens (impractical).

generators.name: Bio Generator
generators.scaling: consumes biofuel/biomass; tile-array
generators.notes: ~16 = T1; ~62 = T2; T3 (~250 gens) impractical.

generators.name: Lava Generator
generators.scaling: consumes lava; tile-array; pair with Nether pump or lava farm
generators.notes: ~16 = T1; ~62 = T2; T3 impractical.

generators.name: Fuel Generator
generators.scaling: consumes refined fuel (Refinery output); tile-array
generators.notes: Top Oritech primary gen. ~4 = T1; ~16 = T2; ~62 = T3 (achievable). T4 (~234 gens) impractical.

generators.name: Solar Generator
generators.scaling: tile-array; sky access; daytime peak
generators.notes: ~31 = T1; T2 impractical.

generators.name: Reactor
generators.scaling: multiblock (maxSize=64); per-pulse 64 FE × pulse rate; hard-capped at reactorMaxEnergyOutput = 25,000 FE/t per build; absorber/vent mechanics manage heat (maxHeat=2000)
generators.notes: Per-multiblock cap is 25k FE/t — exceeds T3 demand (16k) cleanly. T4 (60k) reachable with ~3 reactors but that's a sizable build. Top of Oritech's intra-mod power path; pairs with the Fuel Generator + Refinery loop for fuel feed.

generators.name: Steam Engine
generators.scaling: consumes steam at 1 FE/mB; steam must be generated upstream (boiler-addon costs 2 FE → 1 mB steam, so net-negative as a closed loop)
generators.notes: Conversion device, not primary generation. Useful for routing kinetic/steam from external sources (e.g. Create steam, Mekanism turbine bypass). Excluded from coverage table — primary gen is upstream steam source.

generators.name: Draconic Reactor
generators.scaling: multiblock; output ∝ temperature × shield level × output-coil count; base values are hardcoded in mod (not in config). reactorOutputMultiplier = 1.0 default. Stable late-game tunings (~8000°C, full coil cluster) sit in the 5M-15M RF/t band; aggressive tunings reach 30M+ RF/t with explosion risk.
generators.notes: Closes the Mekanism-only stretch from T4-T8. Pair with Energy Core (large-capacity capacitor, not a generator). Higher-tier tunings can theoretically reach T9+, but the failure mode (multi-chunk explosion) makes those operating points impractical without containment automation. Conservative ceiling at T8.

generators.name: Energy Core
generators.scaling: tier 1-8 multiblock; capacity scales from ~46M RF (T1) to ~2.27 quadrillion RF (T8)
generators.notes: Storage, not generation. Listed for reference because reactor + core is the canonical DE late-game pairing. Excluded from coverage table.
